name: io.github.codespar/c6
description: MCP server for C6 Bank — top Brazilian digital bank backed by JPMorgan. Pix (cob/cobv), DICT keys, Boleto, account balance, and statement via C6's Developer Portal APIs (OAuth2 + mTLS).

environmentVariables.name: C6_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: C6 OAuth client_id issued via the Developer Portal after contract onboarding.

environmentVariables.name: C6_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS client certificate (.crt or .pem). BACEN mandates mTLS for Pix v2.

environmentVariables.name: C6_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS private key (.key or .pem).
